healthcare.title: Primary Healthcare
healthcare.desc: Accessible primary healthcare services delivered through mobile medical units and community clinics for persons with disabilities in both rural and urban areas.

healthcare.title: Vision Care & Correction
healthcare.desc: Eye screening programs, treatment, and assistive vision support services for persons with visual impairments.

healthcare.title: Mental Health Support
healthcare.desc: Counselling, therapy, and awareness programs addressing emotional well-being and mental health challenges for persons with disabilities.

healthcare.title: Telehealth Services
healthcare.desc: Remote consultations with doctors and specialists ensuring accessible healthcare for persons with disabilities who cannot travel easily.

healthcare.title: Long-Term & Palliative Care
healthcare.desc: Compassionate care, pain management, and long-term medical support for persons with severe disabilities or chronic health conditions.

agecare.title: Support Helplines
agecare.desc: 24x7 toll-free helpline providing guidance, legal assistance, counselling and emergency support for persons with disabilities.

agecare.title: Assisted Living Centres
agecare.desc: Safe residential facilities offering accessible living spaces, healthcare services and community support for persons with disabilities.

agecare.title: Community Inclusion Centres
agecare.desc: Inclusive spaces where persons with disabilities participate in social activities, skill development and community engagement.

agecare.title: Rehabilitation & Physiocare
agecare.desc: Physiotherapy and rehabilitation services helping persons with disabilities improve mobility, strength and independence.

agecare.title: Caregiver Training
agecare.desc: Training programmes for families and caregivers to provide better care and support for persons with disabilities.

agecare.title: Assistive Devices
agecare.desc: Providing wheelchairs, walkers, prosthetics and other assistive devices to improve mobility and daily living.

livelihoods.title: Self Help Groups
livelihoods.desc: Community-based savings groups and micro-finance initiatives supporting persons with disabilities to build financial independence.

livelihoods.title: Disaster Support & Relief
livelihoods.desc: Emergency response and inclusive disaster relief ensuring persons with disabilities receive support during floods, cyclones and other crises.

advocacy.title: Awareness & Training Workshops
advocacy.desc: Workshops and awareness programs for communities, institutions and government bodies to promote inclusion and rights of persons with disabilities.

advocacy.title: Youth Inclusion Programs
advocacy.desc: Engaging students and young volunteers to promote empathy, inclusion and support for persons with disabilities.

advocacy.title: Policy Advocacy
advocacy.desc: Working with governments and institutions to strengthen laws, accessibility standards and policies protecting the rights of persons with disabilities.

advocacy.title: Research & Knowledge
advocacy.desc: Conducting research and generating evidence to improve disability inclusion, policy frameworks and social awareness.

stats.label: Elders received support through the Elder Helpline
Elders received primary healthcare at their doorstep
Elders became independent through Elder Self Help Groups
Elders received digital, financial and legal literacy

impactStories.title: Angur Rana's Journey from Petals to Profits
impactStories.desc: At 65, Angur Rana transformed her life through HelpAge India's Elder Self Help Group, turning flower cultivation into a thriving income source.

impactStories.title: Seeing the World Again: A Vision Restoration Story
impactStories.desc: A remarkable journey from vision impairment to restoration through HelpAge India's eye care programme.

impactStories.title: A Call That Changed Everything
impactStories.desc: How one call to our elder helpline rescued a 78-year-old woman from an abusive situation and restored her dignity.

heroSlides.caption: Let's fill their lives with the colours of joy
